scenarios.description: load() with no entries and systemProperties=false skips setting system properties
scenarios.precondition: Ensure no .env file present or an empty .env file in working directory; builder configured with default settings (systemProperties=false)
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv.entries(filter) is empty Set; Dotenv.entries() size equals System.getenv().size(); no new System properties set

scenarios.description: load() with no entries and systemProperties=true still loops zero times
scenarios.expectedResult: returned Dotenv.entries(filter) is empty Set; System.getProperties() contains no new keys from file

scenarios.description: load() with one entry and systemProperties=true sets exactly one System property
scenarios.precondition: Create .env file with single line "KEY1=VALUE1"; clear System property KEY1 before test; builder.systemProperties() invoked
scenarios.expectedResult: System.getProperty("KEY1") equals "VALUE1"; returned Dotenv.entries((f)->true) contains DotenvEntry("KEY1","VALUE1")

scenarios.description: load() with multiple entries and systemProperties=true sets all file entries as System properties
scenarios.precondition: Create .env file with lines "A=1" and "B=2"; clear System properties A and B; builder.systemProperties() invoked
scenarios.expectedResult: System.getProperty("A")=="1" and System.getProperty("B")=="2"; returned Dotenv.entries((f)->true) contains both entries

scenarios.description: load() throws DotenvException when .env file is missing and throwIfMissing=true
scenarios.precondition: Ensure .env file is absent; builder configured with default settings
